title: Closure of Court Premises on the Occasion of Ram Navami
content:
OFFICE OF THE DISTRICT & SESSIONS JUDGE
District Court, Meerut, Uttar Pradesh
Ref. No.: DC/MRT/2025/132
Date: 08 April 2025

NOTICE
Subject: Closure of Court Premises on the Occasion of Ram Navami

It is hereby notified for the information of all Hon’ble Judges, Advocates, Court Officials, Staff Members, Litigants, and the general public that the District Court, Meerut, including all subordinate courts and administrative offices within the court premises, shall remain closed on Wednesday, 9th April 2025, on account of the auspicious occasion of Ram Navami.

Ram Navami commemorates the birth of Lord Shri Ram and is widely celebrated across the country with spiritual fervor and devotion. As per the holiday schedule issued by the Hon’ble High Court of Judicature at Allahabad and the Government of Uttar Pradesh, the court premises will remain closed for the full day.

Details of Closure:
Date: Wednesday, 9th April 2025

Occasion: Ram Navami

Day: Wednesday

Departments Affected:

All Civil and Criminal Courts

Family Court, Meerut

Labour Court and Industrial Tribunal

Legal Aid Services Cell

Record and Registry Sections

Filing Counters

E-Court Services

Judicial Service Centres

Any other allied or supporting branches functioning within the court complex

Litigants, advocates, and court users are requested to make note of this closure and adjust their schedules accordingly. Urgent matters, if any, will be handled by the designated Duty Magistrate as per the duty roster issued separately.

Regular court proceedings and office functions shall resume from Thursday, 10th April 2025.

This notice is being circulated under the instructions and approval of the Hon’ble District & Sessions Judge, Meerut, and should be displayed prominently on all notice boards and communicated to the Bar Association and relevant stakeholders.

By Order of the Hon’ble District & Sessions Judge
District Court, Meerut
Uttar Pradesh

Sd/-
(Rajesh Kumar Srivastava)
Registrar (Administration)
District Court, Meerut
Phone: 0121-2648002
Email: registrar.dcmeerut-up@gov.in

title: Regarding the Verification process
content: As it is already conveyed through mail that every individual person who is working in the court have to verify their id's in physical form
